title: Claude Cowork: The #1 Thing To Know
summary: Jeff Su argues that Claude Cowork requires a fundamentally different prompting approach than Claude Chat. The key difference is using outcome-first language to describe desired end results rather than task-first step-by-step guidance, allowing the system to determine its own approach and complete work autonomously.
